name: Potential PAM Bypass
conditions_text: when the domain is one of the following BDFC
when an event matches any of the following PAM-RULE BB
when the event matches Logon Type (custom) is any of 10
when the Event Payload contains Target Server Name: localhost
when any of Username are contained in any of (Shared) PAM Admin BDF - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
when the source IP is one of the following 172.26.2.143, 172.26.2.196
when the destination IP is one of the following 172.21.1.93
TD_list: APPLY Potential PAM Bypass on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the domain is one of the following BDFC
AND when an event matches any of the following PAM-RULE BB
AND when the event matches Logon Type (custom) is any of 10
AND NOT when the Event Payload contains Target Server Name: localhost
AND NOT when any of Username are contained in any of (Shared) PAM Admin BDF - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
AND NOT when the source IP is one of the following 172.26.2.143, 172.26.2.196
AND NOT when the destination IP is one of the following 172.21.1.93
RED_list: Event description: Login success without PAM
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Username
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
